name: task-lifecycle-followup
description: User creates a follow-up task, agent confirms, later user marks it done. Exercises Task memory type + state transition. Calibrated for AnthropicExtractor v3.

conversation.content: Remind me to call the contractor about the Lapa apartment quote next Tuesday morning.
Got it — I've noted a reminder to call the contractor about the Lapa quote for Tuesday morning.
Actually done — I called them this morning, waiting on the revised quote.

recall_queries.query: what pending tasks does this user have
did the user hear back from the contractor
